use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action confirmation buttons requiring visual warning
Secondary actions alongside primary buttons using outline variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI areas like toolbars
Ghost-style navigation links for minimal UI patterns
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with proper accessibility support via ring focus states.
